hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams unify director and shareholder checks from KYC and KYB providers into a single audit-ready onboarding workflow with traceable decisions and evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Director and shareholder reviews remain fragmented
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to consolidate data from multiple KYC and KYB providers into a unified onboarding review. This fragmentation slows decision-making and weakens the audit trail needed for defensible due diligence and regulatory readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC and KYB provider outputs, corporate data, and screening results into one structured onboarding workflow, enabling compliance teams to conduct consistent reviews with a clear audit trail.
workflow_title: From director checks to onboarding approval
workflow_description: SFTY structures director and shareholder data through screening, risk-based routing, review workflows, case decisions and evidence to support compliant onboarding approval.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond director checks. One onboarding layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured workflows that preserve evidence, support risk-based review and streamline director and shareholder compliance decisions.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports compliance teams with structured onboarding, audit-ready evidence and controlled deployment to manage director and shareholder review securely and transparently.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for director and shareholder reviews?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps compliance teams review directors and shareholders by connecting KYC, KYB and screening outputs into auditable onboarding workflows with risk-based routing and connected case management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure director and shareholder workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures workflows by automating provider orchestration, applying internal rules, routing cases for review, recording decisions and preserving evidence in one continuous compliance process.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding evidence by storing provider results, review logs, decision records and audit trails to support consistent compliance decisions and regulatory inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYC and KYB providers, combining their outputs into one operational layer without disrupting existing provider relationships or workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers but connects their outputs into structured reviews, risk assessments, cases and audit-ready evidence for compliance teams.
final_title: Structure director and shareholder reviews with SFTY
final_description: See how SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into a connected, auditable onboarding workflow for director and shareholder review.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
